text: Metro city ki is bheed mein akele baith kar aaj hospital ka bill dekha aur mera dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai. Pehle hi kirana shop doob gayi thi aur ab saari savings saaf hone ke baad main itna flood ho gaya hoon ki language gap ki wajah se kisi se baat bhi nahi kar paa raha. Is waqt main aage ka remittance ya rent ka koi raasta nahi soch pa raha, bas ek gehra sadma mehsus ho raha hai.

Neighborhood shame ki wajah se gaon jaane ki himmat nahi hai, aur aaj is medical bill ne toh mujhe poori tarah tod diya hai. Dimaag mein bas wahi purane debt spiral ki baatein goonj rahi hain aur main metro ke is chote se kamre mein baith kar bas roye ja raha hoon. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi logically sujh nahi raha, lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega.

Medical bill bharne ke baad jab bank balance zero dekha toh mere hosh ud gaye aur main bas sunn hokar road par khada raha. Papa ne kisan hokar jo umeed mujh par lagayi thi, wo ab is financial crisis mein bikhar gayi hai aur main rone ka control nahi kar pa raha. Is waqt main naya startup ya MNC interview ke baare mein soch hi nahi sakta, bas ye darr mujhe duba raha hai.

Kirana shop ke loss ke baad parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ka jo pressure tha, aaj is hospital bill ne usse ek extreme breakdown mein badal diya hai. Main kuch bhi logically nahi soch pa raha, bas aankhon ke aage andhera aa raha hai aur dimaag blank ho gaya hai. Mujhe lag raha hai ki main sabka gunehgaar hoon aur ye flood of emotions mujhe saans lene bhi nahi de raha.

Sarkari naukri toh mili nahi, aur ab is medical bill ne meri bachi-kuchi himmat bhi saaf kar di hai, main poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon. Dukaan ki EMI ka darr toh door ki baat hai, mujhe ab apna wajood hi ek bojh lag raha hai aur dimaag mein koi rasta nahi dikh raha. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas ek gehra sannata hai jo mujhe andar se kha raha hai.
